Regions Artists Timeline All works

Bill Reid

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Raven and the First Men
by Bill Reid
Contemporary Haida · 1980
Bill Reid's 4-ton yellow cedar sculpture of Raven discovering the first humans huddled inside a clamshell. Haida cosmology carved in a museum rotunda; an emblem of Indigenous art's modern presence.
Spirit of Haida Gwaii
by Bill Reid
Haida · Bill Reid · 1986–1991
A bronze canoe filled with thirteen mythic figures paddling together — Raven, Bear, Eagle, Wolf, and others. Reid worked on it for five years while Parkinson's overtook him.
←Odilon Redon Piri Reis→
